title: Petrol shipment delayed; Limited distribution today (23) & tomorrow (24)
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st); Fuel cargo carrying 40,000 MT of Petrol 92 scheduled to arrive early this morning has been delayed by one day, said Minister Kanchana Wijesekera.

He said on twitter that a limited amount of Petrol will distributed today (23) and Tomorrow (24) island wide. Auto Diesel distributed at full capacity island wide, he added noting that there will be a limited distribution of Super Diesel.
Petrol shipment delayed; Limited distribution today (23) & tomorrow (24)
New bail order for Johnston, 24-hours after CA dismisses application to prevent arrest
